problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: TenderAI: An AI-Powered Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis Platform for Government Procurement.
summary: Design an AI-powered platform to evaluate tenders, understand bidders, and produce explainable evaluation reports. The platform will handle structured reasoning over unstructured data, provide auditability, and ensure consistent, explainable, human-verifiable decisions.
